title: Hybrid Quantum-Classical Encoding for Accurate Residue-Level pKa Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of residue-level pKa values is essential for understanding protein function, stability, and reactivity. While existing resources such as DeepKaDB and CpHMD-derived datasets provide valuable training data, their descriptors remain primarily classical and often struggle to generalize across diverse biochemical environments. We introduce a reproducible hybrid quantum-classical framework that enriches residue-level representations with a Gaussian kernel-based quantum-inspired feature mapping. These quantum-enhanced descriptors are combined with normalized structural features to form a unified hybrid encoding processed by a Deep Quantum Neural Network (DQNN). This architecture captures nonlinear relationships in residue microenvironments that are not accessible to classical models. Benchmarking across multiple curated descriptor sets demonstrates that the DQNN achieves improved cross-context generalization relative to classical baselines. External evaluation on the PKAD-R experimental benchmark and an A$β$40 case study further highlights the robustness and transferability of the quantum-inspired representation. By integrating quantum-inspired feature transformations with classical biochemical descriptors, this work establishes a scalable and experimentally transferable approach for residue-level pKa prediction and broader applications in protein electrostatics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合量子-经典框架，通过量子启发的特征映射增强残基级pKa预测，在跨上下文泛化方面优于经典方法
AI.motivation: 现有pKa预测方法主要依赖经典描述符，在多样化生化环境中泛化能力有限，需要更强大的特征表示来捕捉残基微环境的非线性关系
AI.method: 开发可重复的混合量子-经典框架：1) 使用高斯核基的量子启发特征映射增强残基级表示；2) 结合归一化结构特征形成统一混合编码；3) 通过深度量子神经网络处理这些特征
AI.result: 在多个数据集上基准测试显示，DQNN相比经典基线具有更好的跨上下文泛化能力；在PKAD-R实验基准和Aβ40案例研究中进一步验证了量子启发表示的鲁棒性和可迁移性
AI.conclusion: 通过整合量子启发特征变换与经典生化描述符，建立了可扩展且实验可迁移的残基级pKa预测方法，为蛋白质静电学应用提供了新途径

title: Matlantis-PFP v8: Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potential with Better Experimental Agreements via r2SCAN Functional
summary: Universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (uMLIPs) enable atomistic simulations and high-throughput screening at scales far beyond those accessible with density functional theory (DFT). However, most existing uMLIPs are trained on Perdew--Burke--Ernzerhof (PBE) generalized gradient approximation (GGA) data and are therefore fundamentally limited by PBE-level accuracy. In this paper, we argue that better zero-shot predictions versus experiments must be an explicit design target for uMLIPs and present PFP v8, a uMLIP available on the Matlantis service that overcomes the inherent limitations of the PBE functional by being trained to reproduce the regularized-restored strongly constrained and appropriately normed (r2SCAN) meta-GGA potential-energy surface across a wide range of chemical domains. Without requiring domain-specific fine-tuning, PFP v8 delivers systematically improved agreement with experimental data or high-accuracy references for crystals, molecules, and surfaces, outperforming PBE-based DFT calculations. Crucially, in long-time molecular dynamics simulations that are computationally impractical with DFT, PFP v8 predicts melting points with an average error of approximately 130 K, halving the error relative to PBE-trained models. These results establish that uMLIPs can move beyond the limitations of their training approximations and achieve substantially improved agreement with experiment across diverse chemical domains, further narrowing the gap between simulation and reality.

AI.tldr: PFP v8是一种通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIP），通过训练在r2SCAN meta-GGA势能面上，超越了传统基于PBE GGA训练的uMLIP的精度限制，在零样本预测中显著提高了与实验数据的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数uMLIP基于PBE GGA数据训练，受限于PBE级别的精度。需要开发能够超越训练近似限制、直接提高与实验数据一致性的uMLIP。
AI.method: 开发PFP v8 uMLIP，在Matlantis服务上提供，通过训练在r2SCAN meta-GGA势能面上，覆盖广泛的化学领域，无需领域特定的微调。
AI.result: PFP v8在晶体、分子和表面性质预测上系统性地提高了与实验数据或高精度参考的一致性，优于PBE DFT计算。在分子动力学模拟中，熔点预测平均误差约130K，比PBE训练模型误差减半。
AI.conclusion: uMLIP可以超越其训练近似的限制，在不同化学领域中显著提高与实验的一致性，进一步缩小模拟与现实的差距。

title: Micropatterning photopolymerizable hydrogels for diffusion studies using pillar arrays or photomasks
summary: In situ polymerization and micropatterning of hydrogels on-chip opens the potential for many applications such as tracking and controlling the diffusion of molecules, stimulants, inhibitors, as well as nutrients and drugs, from their source to a target. To enable such applications, we developed hydrogel-on chip platforms for molecular diffusion studies by refining PEGDA-PEG hydrogel in terms of micropatterning and diffusion properties. In the first platform that we introduce here, the design has multiple adjacent microfluidic channels separated with pillar arrays shaping the flow of our custom-prepared photopolymerizable hydrogels and thus enabling the localization of photopolymerization. In the second platform, a photomask formation has been achieved by coupling the micro-milling of 250-\textmu m thickness of PMMA substrate with Platinum (Pt)-coating onto the PMMA mask. In this way the design was obtained to have opaque and transparent regions for light-based polymerization of the PEGDA-PEG hydrogels. The developed method of in situ polymerization of the hydrogel on-chip through photomask has enabled direct transfer of the design of interest to the pre-hydrogel in channel. Next, the developed platforms will be further used to test various compositions of photopolymerizable hydrogels and track and control the diffusion of molecules across hydrogel interfaces. The micropatterning methods and platforms developed here could be tailored to device design and development needs in various application fields from molecular transport to biosensing to electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 开发了两种用于分子扩散研究的芯片上水凝胶平台，通过光聚合实现水凝胶的原位聚合和微图案化，可用于分子扩散追踪和控制。
AI.motivation: 芯片上水凝胶的原位聚合和微图案化对于追踪和控制分子、刺激物、抑制剂、营养物质和药物从源到目标的扩散具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 开发了两种平台：1）多通道微流控平台，通过柱阵列分隔通道，定位光聚合；2）光掩模平台，通过微铣削PMMA基板并镀铂形成不透明/透明区域，实现光聚合图案化。
AI.result: 成功开发了两种水凝胶芯片平台，实现了PEGDA-PEG水凝胶的原位聚合和微图案化，能够将设计图案直接转移到通道中的预水凝胶中。
AI.conclusion: 开发的微图案化方法和平台可定制用于分子传输、生物传感到电子设备等各种应用领域的器件设计和开发需求。

title: ChemFit: A concurrent framework for model parametrization
summary: Parameter optimization in computational chemistry and physics often involves objective functions that are expensive to evaluate, noisy, non-differentiable, or composed of heterogeneous contributions originating from separate simulations. Gradient-free and black box optimization algorithms are powerful tools which are particularly well-suited to solving such optimization problems. However, interfacing simulation engines and parameter optimization libraries can be cumbersome, especially if simulations are expensive and need to be run concurrently. Here, we introduce ChemFit, a flexible Python framework for the definition, composition, and massively concurrent evaluation of simulation-based objective functions, which is designed to operate in conjunction with these algorithms. This framework provides abstractions for heterogeneous objective terms, file-based and in-memory quantity evaluation, and explicit control over concurrency across both objective components and parameter guesses. We demonstrate the versatility of ChemFit for different applications such as: (i) determination of Lennard-Jones parameters for liquid Argon from experimental density data over a range in temperature and pressure, using molecular-dynamics simulations, and (ii) the parameterization of a polarizable force-field for H2O against the structure of small ice clusters obtained from density functional theory calculations. These examples illustrate how ChemFit enables scalable, reproducible, and optimizer-agnostic parameter fitting.

AI.tldr: ChemFit是一个用于计算化学参数优化的Python框架，支持异构目标函数、并发评估，并与无梯度优化算法兼容
AI.motivation: 计算化学和物理中的参数优化面临目标函数评估昂贵、有噪声、不可微分、异构来源等问题，且模拟引擎与优化库的接口复杂，特别是需要并发运行昂贵模拟时
AI.method: 开发ChemFit框架，提供异构目标项抽象、基于文件和内存的量值评估、对目标组件和参数猜测的显式并发控制，支持与无梯度优化算法协同工作
AI.result: 成功应用于两个案例：(1)从实验密度数据确定液态氩的Lennard-Jones参数；(2)基于DFT计算的冰簇结构参数化H2O的极化力场，展示了ChemFit的可扩展性、可重复性和优化器无关性
AI.conclusion: ChemFit为模拟驱动的参数优化提供了一个灵活、可扩展的框架，能够处理异构目标函数并支持大规模并发评估，简化了计算化学中的参数拟合工作流程

title: Reliable Viscosity Calculation from High-Pressure Equilibrium Molecular Dynamics: Case Study of 2,2,4-Trimethylhexane
summary: Viscosity is a fundamental property of liquid lubricants, yet it is challenging to determine accurately, especially at high pressures. Although equilibrium molecular dynamics (EMD) simulations are a promising alternative to resource-intensive experiments, practical challenges remain in assessing the sufficiency of simulation time and in controlling uncertainties in the Green-Kubo formalism due to the finite amount of trajectory data. In this work, we extend the STable AutoCorrelation Integral Estimator (STACIE), a recently developed algorithm for estimating transport properties. First, we introduce the Lorentz model to estimate the viscosity and the exponential correlation time from the low-frequency power spectrum of anisotropic pressure fluctuations. Second, we show how to supplement the three conventional off-diagonal elements of the pressure tensor ($P_{xy}$, $P_{yz}$ and $P_{zx}$) with two additional independent time series for shear viscosity calculations. Using these improvements, we apply STACIE to calculate the shear viscosity of 2,2,4-trimethylhexane from EMD simulations. We demonstrate STACIE's capability to reliably calculate viscosity under high-pressure conditions, offering a robust and automated solution with validated uncertainty quantification. Our results, when compared to the outcomes of the 10th International Fluid Properties Simulation Challenge (IFPSC), underscore the need for long EMD simulations. Large deviations from experimental viscosities in previous works were primarily due to insufficient simulation times and ad hoc post-processing choices, rather than the limitations of the force fields used. Unlike previous studies, our viscosity estimates agree well with experimental results (relative error < 6%) up to the highest pressure of 1 GPa, highlighting the improved reliability and accuracy of STACIE's systematic approach to viscosity predictions.

AI.tldr: 扩展STACIE算法，通过引入Lorentz模型和增加压力张量时间序列，提高分子动力学模拟中高压力下剪切粘度的计算精度和可靠性
AI.motivation: 液体润滑剂的粘度是基本性质，但在高压下难以准确测量。虽然平衡分子动力学模拟是实验的替代方案，但现有方法存在模拟时间不足和Green-Kubo形式中不确定性控制困难的问题
AI.method: 扩展STACIE算法：1) 引入Lorentz模型从压力波动的低频功率谱估计粘度和指数相关时间；2) 在剪切粘度计算中补充两个额外的独立时间序列；3) 将改进方法应用于2,2,4-三甲基己烷的EMD模拟
AI.result: STACIE能够可靠计算高压条件下的粘度，相对误差小于6%，最高压力达1 GPa。与IFPSC结果对比表明，先前研究的大偏差主要源于模拟时间不足和临时后处理选择，而非力场限制
AI.conclusion: STACIE的系统方法显著提高了粘度预测的可靠性和准确性，为高压条件下液体粘度的分子动力学模拟提供了稳健的自动化解决方案

title: Moiré in $Γ$-valley square lattice: Copper- and iron-based superconductor simulation in a single device
summary: Novel superconducting phases have been found in various moiré heterostructures based on hexagonal lattices. However, the archetypal high-temperature superconductors (cuprates, iron-based and nickelate families) all share a square lattice foundation. These materials host a rich landscape of correlated phenomena, such as charge and spin stripes, pseudogap behavior, and unconventional metallicity, which continue to challenge our fundamental understanding of strongly correlated electrons. In this work, we investigate the possibility of simulating the effective models governing these high-$T_c$ superconductors using twisted homobilayers of $Γ$-valley square-lattice systems. We develop a universal theoretical framework and carry out a detailed analysis of a promising candidate material ZnF$_2$. We find that the first moiré band realizes a single-orbital square-lattice Hubbard model, widely believed to capture cuprate physics, while the second and third moiré bands map to a $p_x,p_y$ two-orbital square-lattice Hubbard model, which shares common physics to the minimal $d_{xz}, d_{yz}$ models proposed for iron pnictides. Our study combines continuum Hamiltonian modeling, first-principle calculations, and Hartree-Fock mean field theory. The latter focuses on the quarter-filling regime of the two-orbital model and in particular leads to, among others, a stable antiferro-orbital, ferromagnetic insulating phase. These results highlight $Γ$-valley square-lattice moiré systems as a new and important generation of van der Waals heterostructures to realize interesting strongly correlated phases of matter.

AI.tldr: 提出利用Γ-谷方晶格莫尔异质结构模拟高温超导体的有效模型，以ZnF₂为例展示了单轨道和双轨道哈伯德模型的实现。
AI.motivation: 传统高温超导体（铜酸盐、铁基和镍酸盐）都基于方晶格结构，但现有的莫尔异质结构主要基于六角晶格。需要开发方晶格莫尔系统来模拟这些高温超导体的物理机制。
AI.method: 结合连续哈密顿量建模、第一性原理计算和哈特里-福克平均场理论，分析ZnF₂材料，研究其莫尔能带结构。
AI.result: 第一莫尔能带实现单轨道方晶格哈伯德模型（模拟铜酸盐物理），第二和第三莫尔能带映射到px,py双轨道方晶格哈伯德模型（模拟铁基超导体）。在四分之一填充的双轨道模型中发现了稳定的反铁磁轨道-铁磁绝缘相。
AI.conclusion: Γ-谷方晶格莫尔系统是新一代范德华异质结构，能够实现有趣的强关联物质相，为模拟高温超导体物理提供了新平台。

title: From Phase Prediction to Phase Design: A ReAct Agent Framework for High-Entropy Alloy Discovery
summary: Discovering high-entropy alloy (HEA) compositions that reliably form a target crystal phase is a high-dimensional inverse design problem that conventional trial-and-error experimentation and forward-only machine learning models cannot efficiently solve. Here we present a ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) LLM agent that autonomously proposes, validates, and iteratively refines HEA compositions by querying a calibrated XGBoost surrogate trained on 4,753 experimental records across four phases (FCC, BCC, BCC+FCC, BCC+IM), achieving 94.66\% accuracy (F1 macro = 0.896). Against Bayesian optimisation (BO) and random search baselines, the full-prompt agent achieves descriptor-space rediscovery rates of 38\%, 18\%, and 38\% for FCC, BCC, and BCC+FCC (Mann--Whitney $p \leq 0.039$), with proposals lying 2.4--22.8$\times$ closer to the experimental phase manifold than random search. An ablation reveals that domain priors shift the agent from landmark-alloy recall toward compositionally diverse exploration -- an uninformed agent scores higher rediscovery by concentrating on literature-dense families, while the full-prompt agent explores underrepresented space (unique ratio 1.0 vs.\ 0.39 for BCC+FCC). These regimes represent distinct criteria: proximity to known literature versus genuine discovery. Spearman analysis confirms agent reasoning is statistically aligned with empirical phase distributions ($ρ= 0.736$, $p = 0.004$ for BCC). This work establishes LLM-guided agentic reasoning as a principled, transparent, and manifold-aware complement to gradient-free optimisation for inverse alloy design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于ReAct LLM代理的高熵合金逆向设计方法，通过自主提出、验证和迭代优化合金成分，显著提高了目标晶体相的设计效率。
AI.motivation: 传统试错实验和前向机器学习模型无法高效解决高熵合金成分设计这一高维逆向设计问题，需要更智能的自主设计方法。
AI.method: 开发了ReAct（推理+行动）LLM代理，结合在4,753个实验记录上训练的XGBoost代理模型，自主提出、验证和迭代优化高熵合金成分。
AI.result: 代理模型在FCC、BCC和BCC+FCC相的重现率分别达到38%、18%和38%，比随机搜索更接近实验相流形（2.4-22.8倍），且能探索文献中代表性不足的空间。
AI.conclusion: LLM引导的代理推理为合金逆向设计提供了原则性、透明且流形感知的补充方法，能够平衡已知文献接近度和真正新发现之间的关系。

title: Progress of ambient-pressure superconductivity in bilayer nickelate thin films
summary: This review summarizes recent progress of ambient-pressure superconductivity in bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films, a major advancement following the discovery of high-pressure superconductivity in bulk La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$. First, we explain how epitaxial strain engineering enables ambient-pressure superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films, with compressive strain from substrates like SrLaAlO$_4$ stabilizing superconductivity. Next, we review experimental characterizations of related systems, with particular emphasis on ARPES measurements that have shown conflicting Fermi surface topologies. We then discuss progress in increasing the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$. Finally, we summarize theoretical studies of the electronic structure and pairing symmetry of La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films. Together, these advances establish bilayer nickelate thin films as a highly tunable and promising platform for exploring high-$T_c$ superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜在常压超导方面的最新进展，重点讨论了应变工程如何实现常压超导、实验表征、Tc提升以及理论研究。
AI.motivation: 在体相La₃Ni₂O₇高压超导发现后，研究如何在常压下实现超导成为重要方向。薄膜材料通过应变工程提供了实现常压超导的新途径，为探索高Tc超导机制提供了可调控的平台。
AI.method: 采用外延应变工程，通过SrLaAlO₄等衬底施加压缩应变来稳定超导态；结合ARPES等实验表征技术研究费米面拓扑；通过理论计算研究电子结构和配对对称性。
AI.result: 压缩应变成功实现了La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜的常压超导；实验表征揭示了费米面拓扑的争议性结果；超导转变温度Tc得到提升；理论研究为理解超导机制提供了重要见解。
AI.conclusion: 双层镍酸盐薄膜通过应变工程实现了常压超导，成为高度可调控的高Tc超导研究平台，为探索镍基超导机制和开发新型超导材料开辟了新途径。

title: Selective braiding of different anyons in the even-denominator fractional quantum Hall effect
summary: Even-denominator quantum Hall states can host several types of anyons with distinct exchange statistics. Depending on the anyon type, exchanging two quasiparticles can impart a phase to the many-body wave function or even transform it into a different state. Here, we realize a gate-tunable Fabry-Pérot interferometer with an embedded antidot that provides local control over the number of anyons within the interference loop. By independently tuning the magnetic field, carrier densities across the device, and the antidot potential, we access regimes in which localized anyons form reproducibly and measure the associated statistical phases $e^{i θ_\mathrm{braid}}$. We resolve braiding phases of $θ_{\mathrm{braid}}=π$ and $θ_{\mathrm{braid}}=\fracπ{2}$, which we attribute to $e/2$ quasiparticles encircling either $e/2$ or $e/4$ quasiparticles, respectively. We further observe switching between different anyon occupancies of the antidot over time, directly resolving individual anyon tunnelling events into the interference loop. Similar behavior occurs at filling factor one third. Our work addresses one of the two key challenges in observing non-Abelian braiding, which requires control of both localized and interfering anyon types.

AI.tldr: 利用门可调法布里-珀罗干涉仪测量偶数分母量子霍尔态中任意子的编织相位，观测到π和π/2的统计相位，并直接解析了单个任意子隧穿事件
AI.motivation: 偶数分母量子霍尔态可以承载多种具有不同交换统计特性的任意子，但实现非阿贝尔编织观测需要同时控制局域化和干涉的任意子类型，这是该领域的两个关键挑战之一
AI.method: 构建了门可调法布里-珀罗干涉仪，其中嵌入反点结构，通过独立调节磁场、器件各区域的载流子密度和反点电势，实现对干涉环内任意子数量的局部控制
AI.result: 测量到编织相位θ_braid=π和θ_braid=π/2，分别对应于e/2准粒子环绕e/2或e/4准粒子的情况；观测到反点任意子占据数随时间切换，直接解析了单个任意子隧穿进入干涉环的事件；在填充因子1/3处观察到类似行为
AI.conclusion: 该工作解决了观测非阿贝尔编织的两个关键挑战之一，实现了对局域化和干涉任意子类型的控制，为任意子统计特性的实验研究提供了重要工具

title: Pattern stability in reaction-diffusion systems depends on path entropy
summary: Reaction-diffusion systems driven far from thermodynamic equilibrium through the injection of energy can support multiple distinct spatial patterns that persist as long-lived dynamical phases. The stability of these metastable phases is not determined by thermodynamics, but by the transition paths connecting them. At finite particle numbers, intrinsic stochasticity induces rare transitions between competing patterns, rendering continuum mean-field descriptions insufficient, while exact stochastic simulations become computationally prohibitive in spatially extended systems. Here, we develop a nonequilibrium instanton framework that enables efficient computation of transition rates between metastable patterns from a single optimal transition path and its fluctuations. Using this theoretical framework, we show that an effective entropy in path space can qualitatively alter stability at finite particle numbers by increasing the exit rates of metastable patterns. By studying models of varying complexity, this work establishes path entropy as a key organizing principle for nonequilibrium pattern formation.

AI.tldr: 开发非平衡瞬子框架计算有限粒子数下反应扩散系统中空间模式间的跃迁速率，发现路径熵能显著改变非平衡模式的稳定性
AI.motivation: 反应扩散系统远离热力学平衡时能维持多种空间模式，但这些亚稳态的稳定性不由热力学决定，而是由连接它们的跃迁路径决定。有限粒子数下的内在随机性导致模式间罕见跃迁，连续平均场描述不足，而精确随机模拟在空间扩展系统中计算成本过高。
AI.method: 开发非平衡瞬子框架，通过单个最优跃迁路径及其涨落高效计算亚稳态模式间的跃迁速率。该理论框架能够分析路径空间中的有效熵对稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 路径空间中的有效熵能通过增加亚稳态模式的退出速率，在有限粒子数下显著改变稳定性。通过研究不同复杂度的模型，确立了路径熵作为非平衡模式形成的关键组织原则。
AI.conclusion: 路径熵是理解有限粒子数下非平衡模式稳定性的关键因素，非平衡瞬子框架为高效计算模式间跃迁速率提供了有效工具，为研究非平衡模式形成提供了新的理论视角。

title: Accurate prediction of inverted singlet-triplet excited states using self-consistent spin-opposite perturbation theory
summary: The violation of Hund's rule, resulting in an inverted singlet-triplet (INVEST) gap, represents a paradigm shift in photophysics with major implications for OLED technology. INVEST molecules facilitate barrierless reverse intersystem crossing, theoretically permitting 100\% internal quantum efficiency without thermal activation. However, accurately predicting negative singlet-triplet energy gaps typically demands prohibitive computational costs. In this study, we evaluate the efficacy of our recently developed one-body Møller-Plesset perturbation theory (OBMP2) and its spin-opposite variant (O2BMP2) as efficient alternatives. Benchmarking against 30 INVEST molecules reveals that O2BMP2, with appropriate spin-opposite scaling, achieves the accuracy of ADC(3) and EOM-CCSD. Furthermore, with the possibility of reducing computational complexity to $N^4$, O2BMP2 provides a robust balance of accuracy and efficiency, making it suitable for the high-throughput screening of next-generation INVEST materials.

AI.tldr: OBMP2和O2BMP2方法能高效预测违反洪特规则的负单重态-三重态能隙，为OLED材料高通量筛选提供准确且计算成本低的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 违反洪特规则的INVEST分子具有负单重态-三重态能隙，可实现无势垒反向系间窜越和100%内量子效率，但传统计算方法计算成本过高，需要开发高效预测方法。
AI.method: 使用最近开发的单电子Møller-Plesset微扰理论(OBMP2)及其自旋相反变体(O2BMP2)，通过适当的自旋相反缩放，对30个INVEST分子进行基准测试。
AI.result: O2BMP2方法在准确度上达到ADC(3)和EOM-CCSD水平，同时计算复杂度可降至N^4，在准确性和效率之间取得了良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: O2BMP2方法为下一代INVEST材料的高通量筛选提供了强大工具，实现了计算准确性和效率的平衡。

title: A Scattered-Field Formulation for Coupled Geometric Wakefield and Space Charge Field Simulations in Particle Accelerators
summary: We propose a self-consistent simulation model for particle beams in accelerators, which includes the impact of electromagnetic wakefields caused by the geometry of the accelerator chamber. The method is based on a scattered-field formulation for the beam-driven Maxwell's equations. The total electromagnetic field seen by the particles is obtained as the solution of two coupled problems: a purely wakefield problem and a space charge field problem, where for each of these problems, specialized and numerically efficient approaches can be used. To assess the accuracy of the method, we compare simulation results with the analytical solution for a relativistic beam in a uniform accelerator pipe. The numerical efficiency of the method is, furthermore, demonstrated in the beam dynamics study of the multi-cell RF photo-gun installed at the SuperKEK collider facility. We show that electromagnetic wakefields have a non-negligible impact on the quality of the generated beam and, therefore, should be taken into account in the design of high-brilliance electron sources.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种包含加速器腔室几何结构引起的电磁尾场效应的粒子束自洽模拟模型，采用散射场公式求解束流驱动的麦克斯韦方程，将总电磁场分解为尾场和空间电荷场两个耦合问题分别高效求解。
AI.motivation: 在高亮度电子源设计中，加速器腔室几何结构引起的电磁尾场对束流质量有不可忽视的影响，需要开发能够准确模拟这种效应的计算方法。
AI.method: 基于散射场公式的束流驱动麦克斯韦方程求解方法，将总电磁场分解为尾场问题和空间电荷场问题两个耦合部分，针对每个问题采用专门且数值高效的方法求解。
AI.result: 通过与均匀加速管道中相对论束流的解析解对比验证了方法的准确性，并在SuperKEK对撞机设施的多单元RF光电枪束流动力学研究中展示了数值效率，证明电磁尾场对束流质量有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 电磁尾场对高亮度电子源产生的束流质量有重要影响，在设计高亮度电子源时必须考虑这一因素，所提出的自洽模拟模型为此提供了有效的数值工具。

title: Can electronic quantum criticality drive phonon-induced linear-in-temperature resistivity?
summary: Optical phonons naturally generate linear-in-$T$ resistivity in the high-temperature equipartition regime, but their finite gap prevents this mechanism from surviving to asymptotically low temperatures. Here we analyze whether proximity to an electronic quantum critical point can remove this obstruction by strongly softening an optical phonon. We first derive a model-independent criterion for such softened phonons to control low-temperature transport: besides reducing the renormalized optical gap, the Landau-damped phonon must acquire a dynamical exponent $z_p>d$, where $d$ is the spatial dimension of the phonon, so that a sufficiently large thermally occupied phase space survives as $T\to 0$. We then analyze a concrete mechanism in which the phonon couples nonlinearly to long-wavelength electronic collective modes near a $\vec{Q}=0$ quantum critical point, and apply it to the Ising-nematic case. Within a large-$N$ field theoretic formulation, the phonon softening is enhanced near criticality, but in the clean theory the resulting dynamics lies at or near the marginal boundary for asymptotic $T$-linear scattering. Including feedback from the softened phonon back onto the electronic critical sector further weakens the tendency toward robust low-temperature $T$-linear transport. Our results sharpen both the promise and the limitations of phonon-based explanations of strange-metal transport near electronic criticality.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在电子量子临界点附近，软化的光学声子是否能在低温下产生线性温度依赖的电阻率。作者提出了判断标准，并通过具体模型分析发现，尽管声子软化增强，但清洁理论中该机制在低温下难以维持稳健的线性温度依赖电阻率。
AI.motivation: 光学声子在高温下能产生线性温度依赖电阻率，但其有限能隙阻碍了该机制在低温下的延续。研究目的是探索电子量子临界点附近的声子软化是否能克服这一限制，为奇异金属输运现象提供声子基解释。
AI.method: 首先推导了软化声子控制低温输运的模型无关判据：重整化光学能隙减小，且朗道阻尼声子需获得动力学指数z_p>d。然后分析具体机制，其中声子与量子临界点附近的长波长电子集体模式非线性耦合，并以伊辛向列相为例，采用大N场论方法进行研究。
AI.result: 在临界点附近声子软化确实增强，但在清洁理论中，所得动力学处于或接近渐进线性温度散射的边际边界。软化声子对电子临界区的反馈进一步削弱了低温下稳健线性温度依赖输运的倾向。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果既揭示了声子基解释在电子临界性附近解释奇异金属输运的潜力，也明确了其局限性。尽管声子软化增强，但难以在低温下维持稳健的线性温度依赖电阻率机制。

title: Exceptional Optical Phonon Coherence in Enriched Cubic Boron Arsenide via Suppression of Three-Phonon Scattering
summary: Cubic boron arsenide (BAs) is a promising semiconductor for next-generation electronics due to its outstanding ambipolar mobility and thermal conductivity, the latter of which is attributed to the suppression of three-phonon scattering. However, precisely accounting for different high-order anharmonic scattering processes is challenging from both theory and experiment, so that questions remain open regarding the ultimate limit of phonon lifetime and thermal conductivity in BAs. Here we show that this gap nearly eliminates three-phonon scattering for zone-center optical phonons in a wide temperature range, leading to a record-high, isotope purity-limited phonon coherence with a quality factor above $3.7\times 10^3$ for >98% enriched $^{11}$BAs below 100 K. We discriminate three decoherence mechanisms by their temperature-dependent contribution to the damping rate using high-resolution Raman and Fourier transform infrared spectroscopy. For the as-synthesized crystals, we find that defect scattering has negligible contributions to the linewidth of optical phonons in comparison to isotope scattering. These results provide critical insights into the intrinsic and extrinsic scattering mechanisms of optical phonons in BAs, motivating further studies to quantify anharmonic effects and realize superior phonon transport.

AI.tldr: 立方砷化硼(BAs)因其优异的双极性迁移率和热导率成为下一代电子器件的有前途材料，但高阶非谐散射过程难以精确表征。本研究通过高分辨率光谱揭示了BAs中光学声子的散射机制，发现同位素散射是主要散射源，在低温下实现了创纪录的高品质因子。
AI.motivation: 立方砷化硼(BAs)具有出色的双极性迁移率和热导率，但其声子寿命和热导率的极限仍不清楚，因为高阶非谐散射过程在理论和实验上都难以精确表征。需要理解BAs中声子的内在和外在散射机制，特别是光学声子的退相干过程。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率拉曼光谱和傅里叶变换红外光谱，测量不同温度下BAs晶体的声子线宽。通过温度依赖的阻尼率分析，区分了三种退相干机制。使用同位素纯度>98%的¹¹BAs晶体，在低于100K的温度下进行研究。
AI.result: 在高度富集的¹¹BAs晶体中，低温下实现了创纪录的高品质因子(>3.7×10³)，几乎消除了三声子散射。发现同位素散射是光学声子线宽的主要贡献者，而缺陷散射的贡献可以忽略不计。成功区分了三种退相干机制的温度依赖贡献。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了BAs中光学声子的内在和外在散射机制，同位素散射是主要限制因素。这些结果为量化非谐效应和实现优越的声子输运提供了关键见解，激励进一步研究以探索BAs的极限热导性能。

title: Pseudo Point Nodal Superconducting Gap in Spin-Triplet UTe$_2$
summary: The unconventional superconductor UTe$_2$ represents a rare example of spin-triplet pairing with potentially topologically protected quantum states. However, conflicting reports on its gap structure, particularly regarding point nodes, have hindered understanding of the order parameter symmetry and topological properties. Here we report high-resolution thermal conductivity measurements on high-quality UTe$_2$ single crystals down to ~50 mK that resolve the gap anisotropy through bulk directional transport. The $b$-axis thermal conductivity $κ_b/T$ exhibits negligible residual conductivity as $T \to 0$, and its temperature dependence is consistent with a small superconducting energy gap along the $b$-axis. Under magnetic fields, the residual $κ_b/T$ shows only weak field-induced enhancement. Remarkably, a threshold field emerges at low fields for $H \parallel a$, characterized by a kink that signals a change in quasiparticle transport normal to the field. Below the threshold, $κ_b/T$ remains isotropic for all field orientations, whereas strong anisotropy between transport along and normal to the field develops above it. These signatures strongly suggest that UTe$_2$ exhibits a fully gapped state with a pseudo point-nodal structure, where gap minima approach but never reach zero. We estimate the minimal gap $Δ_{min}/Δ_0 \sim 0.1$ along the $b$-axis, where $Δ_0$ is the characteristic superconducting gap. This unusual gap structure provides crucial insights into the pairing mechanism and topology of this spin-triplet superconductor and excludes non-unitary mixing of pairing symmetries.

AI.tldr: UTe₂超导体热导率测量揭示其具有完全能隙的赝点节点结构，而非真正的节点，最小能隙约为特征能隙的10%，排除了非幺正配对对称性混合。
AI.motivation: UTe₂作为稀有的自旋三重态超导体，其能隙结构和配对对称性存在争议，特别是关于点节点的报道相互矛盾，阻碍了对该材料拓扑性质的理解。
AI.method: 使用高质量UTe₂单晶进行高分辨率热导率测量，温度低至~50 mK，通过体相定向输运研究能隙各向异性，分析b轴热导率κ_b/T的温度和磁场依赖关系。
AI.result: b轴热导率在T→0时残余电导率可忽略，温度依赖表明沿b轴存在小能隙；磁场下κ_b/T仅微弱增强；发现H∥a时存在阈值场，低于阈值时κ_b/T各向同性，高于阈值时沿场和垂直场方向输运呈现强各向异性。
AI.conclusion: UTe₂具有完全能隙的赝点节点结构，能隙最小值接近但不为零，最小能隙Δ_min/Δ_0~0.1，这一不寻常的能隙结构为理解自旋三重态配对机制和拓扑性质提供了关键见解，排除了非幺正配对对称性混合。

title: Imaging flat band electron hydrodynamics in biased bilayer graphene
comment: 19 pages, 4 main figures, 8 extended data figures
summary: Hydrodynamic electron transport arises when carrier kinetics are dominated by interelectron collisions rather than the relaxation of momentum out of the electron system. In recent years, signatures of electron hydrodynamics have been reported in graphene devices owing to the low disorder and weak electron-phonon coupling. However, these experiments have been performed in regimes where the carrier mass is light, and the electron-electron collision length--though smaller than corresponding lengths for phonon or impurity scattering--remains large in absolute terms, typically several hundred nanometers. This restricts hydrodynamic transport phenomena to large length scales, limiting miniaturization of devices based on hydrodynamic flow. The advent of dual-gated rhombohedral graphene multilayers introduces a new route toward enhanced hydrodynamic behavior via their large--and tunable--effective mass. Here, we employ a scanning superconducting magnetic sensor to image local current flow in dual-gated bilayer graphene. Exploiting a sample geometry sensitive to both laminar and vortical flow, we identify three distinct transport regimes--ballistic, hydrodynamic, and diffusive--across the full phase space spanned by carrier density and displacement field. The strongest hydrodynamic transport is observed in the flat band regime, where fitting our results to a unified Boltzmann transport model reveals the electron-electron scattering length to be comparable to the Fermi wavelength of ~50 nm. High-current measurements, meanwhile, reveal striking nonlinearities in the flow pattern. Our results pave the way for miniaturized electronic devices based on linear and nonlinear electron hydrodynamics.

AI.tldr: 在双层石墨烯中通过扫描超导磁传感器成像电流流动，发现了弹道、流体动力学和扩散三种输运机制，其中平带区域表现出最强的流体动力学行为，电子-电子散射长度约50纳米，为基于电子流体力学的微型化器件开辟道路。
AI.motivation: 传统石墨烯器件中的电子流体动力学效应受限于电子质量轻、电子-电子散射长度大（数百纳米），限制了基于流体动力学流动的器件微型化。需要寻找增强流体动力学行为的途径。
AI.method: 使用扫描超导磁传感器对双栅双层石墨烯中的局部电流流动进行成像。利用对层流和涡流都敏感的样品几何结构，在载流子密度和位移场构成的完整相空间中识别输运机制。采用统一的玻尔兹曼输运模型拟合数据。
AI.result: 在载流子密度和位移场相空间中识别出三种不同的输运机制：弹道、流体动力学和扩散输运。最强的流体动力学输运出现在平带区域，电子-电子散射长度约50纳米，与费米波长相当。高电流测量显示流动模式的显著非线性特征。
AI.conclusion: 双栅双层石墨烯的平带区域提供了增强的流体动力学行为，电子-电子散射长度显著减小至约50纳米，为基于线性和非线性电子流体力学的微型化电子器件开辟了新途径。

title: Unraveling anomalous relaxation effects in the thermodynamic limit
summary: We address two central open problems in the theory of anomalous Mpemba-like relaxations: their extension beyond one spatial dimension and their consistent formulation in the thermodynamic limit. Our framework is the antiferromagnetic Ising model on a square lattice under an externally applied magnetic field, which enables us to work in the presence of a phase transition. The rich phase diagram contains two control parameters: temperature and magnetic field. We demonstrate that the standard assumption of relaxation dominated by a single leading exponential is inconsistent for intensive observables exhibiting standard fluctuations. Instead, as the system size increases, a continuous spectrum of time scales emerges. Nevertheless, we make the ansatz that, in the vicinity of the phase transition, the spectral projector onto the slowest time scales can be effectively characterized in terms of an equilibrium thermodynamic quantity: the susceptibility associated with the order parameter of the metastable phase. Combined with the richness of the phase diagram, this ansatz yields qualitative and semi-quantitative predictions for optimal protocols leading to a variety of anomalous relaxation phenomena involving simultaneous variations of temperature and magnetic field. These include direct and inverse Mpemba effects, cooling-heating asymmetries, and faster heating induced by precooling. Careful Monte Carlo simulations validate our theoretical predictions. Furthermore, minimal post-optimization suffices to convert our analytically guided protocols into fully optimal ones that display anomalous relaxations in their most pronounced form.

AI.tldr: 该研究解决了异常Mpemba弛豫理论中的两个核心问题：扩展到多维空间和在热力学极限下的自洽表述。通过方形晶格上的反铁磁Ising模型，揭示了在相变附近，弛豫由连续谱主导而非单一指数衰减，并提出用序参量的平衡热力学磁化率来表征最慢时间尺度。
AI.motivation: 解决异常Mpemba弛豫理论中的两个开放性问题：1）将理论扩展到一维以上空间维度；2）在热力学极限下建立自洽的表述框架。这些现象包括直接和逆Mpemba效应、冷却-加热不对称性等反常弛豫行为。
AI.method: 采用方形晶格上的反铁磁Ising模型，在外加磁场下工作，利用丰富的相图（温度和磁场两个控制参数）。理论分析结合蒙特卡洛模拟验证，通过谱投影方法将最慢时间尺度与平衡热力学磁化率联系起来。
AI.result: 发现对于具有标准涨落的强度可观测量，单一主导指数弛豫的假设不成立；随着系统尺寸增大，会出现连续的时间尺度谱。在相变附近，最慢时间尺度可以用亚稳态相序参量的平衡磁化率有效表征。该框架能够预测导致各种反常弛豫现象的最优协议。
AI.conclusion: 成功将异常Mpemba弛豫理论扩展到多维空间和热力学极限，建立了相变附近弛豫动力学的理论框架。通过平衡热力学量预测最优协议，并经蒙特卡洛模拟验证，为理解和设计反常弛豫现象提供了新途径。

title: Accurate prediction of K-edge excitation energies using state-specific self-consistent perturbation theory
summary: We present the application of the recently developed one-body Møller--Plesset perturbation theory (OBMP2) to the prediction of K-edge excited states. OBMP2 is a self-consistent perturbation theory in which a canonical transformation followed by a cumulant approximation yields an effective one-body Hamiltonian. This resulting operator augments the standard Fock operator with a one-body correlation potential containing double-excitation MP2 amplitudes, allowing molecular orbitals and orbital energies to be optimized in the presence of correlation. This self-consistent framework mitigates convergence and accuracy issues often encountered in standard non-iterative MP2 for open-shell systems and bond-stretching regimes. In this work, we evaluate the performance of an OBMP2-based approach for the calculation of K-edge excitations. Utilizing benchmark test sets of both closed-shell and open-shell molecules, we demonstrate that our method outperforms established standard techniques, including $Δ$DFT, EOM-CCSD, and USTEOM-CCSD. Our findings establish the OBMP2-based $Δ$SCF protocol as a robust and accurate new computational method for the treatment of K-edge excited states.

AI.tldr: OBMP2方法应用于K-edge激发态预测，通过自洽微扰理论优化分子轨道和轨道能量，在闭壳层和开壳层分子中表现优于ΔDFT、EOM-CCSD等现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统非迭代MP2方法在处理开壳层系统和键拉伸体系时存在收敛性和精度问题，需要开发更稳健的计算方法用于K-edge激发态预测。
AI.method: 采用单体重MP2微扰理论，通过正则变换和累积近似得到有效单体重哈密顿量，在Fock算符基础上加入包含双激发MP2振幅的单体重关联势，实现分子轨道和轨道能量的自洽优化。
AI.result: 在闭壳层和开壳层分子的基准测试中，OBMP2方法在K-edge激发态计算上优于ΔDFT、EOM-CCSD和USTEOM-CCSD等标准技术。
AI.conclusion: 基于OBMP2的ΔSCF协议为K-edge激发态处理提供了一种稳健且准确的新计算方法。

title: Crossover to Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev criticality in an infinite-range quantum Heisenberg spin glass
summary: We study the equilibrium dynamics of an infinite-range quantum Heisenberg model with random couplings, in which local magnetic moments arise from $\mathcal{N}_f$ flavors of spinful fermions. We employ an expansion in $\mathcal{N}_f$, which controls the strength of quantum fluctuations, and self-consistently include $1/\mathcal{N}_f$ corrections to the Luttinger-Ward functional. In the large-$\mathcal{N}_f$ limit, where quantum fluctuations are weak, the high- and low-temperature phases are respectively paramagnetic and spin glass ordered, with a transition temperature independent of $\mathcal{N}_f$. For small numbers of fermionic flavors, however, quantum fluctuations substantially suppress the ordering temperature. We show that this behavior reflects the proximity of the system to a Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) phase, where both fermionic and spin spectral densities display critical behavior over a broad range of finite frequencies, with the latter exhibiting the scale-invariant form $χ''(ω)\sim \operatorname{sgn}(ω)$. At the lowest energies and temperatures, spin-glass dynamics ultimately take over, producing a universal sub-Ohmic dynamical spin susceptibility $χ''(ω)\sim \operatorname{sgn}(ω)\sqrt{|ω|}$. Our results establish a minimal framework for understanding dynamical crossovers between SYK criticality and spin-glass ordering.

AI.tldr: 研究无限范围量子海森堡模型在随机耦合下的平衡动力学，通过大N展开分析量子涨落对自旋玻璃相变的影响，发现系统接近SYK临界相，并在低温下展现普适的亚欧姆动态自旋磁化率。
AI.motivation: 建立理解SYK临界性与自旋玻璃有序之间动力学交叉的最小框架，研究量子涨落如何抑制有序温度并影响系统的临界行为。
AI.method: 采用无限范围量子海森堡模型，通过大N展开控制量子涨落强度，自洽地包含Luttinger-Ward泛函的1/N修正，分析不同温度下的相变行为。
AI.result: 在大N极限下，高温顺磁相与低温自旋玻璃相之间存在相变；小N时量子涨落显著抑制有序温度；系统接近SYK临界相，自旋谱密度在有限频率范围展现临界行为；最低能标下自旋玻璃动力学主导，产生普适的亚欧姆动态磁化率χ''(ω)∼sgn(ω)√|ω|。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了理解SYK临界性与自旋玻璃有序之间动力学交叉的最小理论框架，揭示了量子涨落对相变温度和临界行为的显著影响。

title: Switchable circular dichroism and ionic migration dominated charge transport in a chiral spin crossover polymer
summary: We demonstrate thermally switchable chiroptical activity in a chiral spin crossover (SCO) material, where circular dichroism is significant in the low spin state but quenched in the high-spin state for both enantiomers. With magnetometry we establish a cooperative transition with hysteresis near room temperature. Fe L3,2 edge Xray absorption directly links the quenching of chirality to a reorganization of Fe 3d electronic structure that accompanies the spin state transition. Moreover, electrical measurements show pronounced I(V) hysteresis and cycling dependent C(V) behavior, indicating transport in this chiral SCO material is dominated by ionic migration rather than mobile electrons or holes.

AI.tldr: 手性自旋交叉材料在低自旋态具有显著圆二色性，在高自旋态手性被淬灭，且电输运由离子迁移主导而非电子/空穴
AI.motivation: 研究手性自旋交叉材料中手性光学活性的热开关行为，探索自旋态转变如何影响手性表达，并理解这类材料的电输运机制
AI.method: 使用磁测量确定相变特性，通过Fe L3,2边X射线吸收光谱分析电子结构变化，进行电学测量(I-V和C-V)研究输运机制
AI.result: 发现手性圆二色性在低自旋态显著而在高自旋态被淬灭；观察到室温附近具有滞后的协同相变；Fe 3d电子结构重组导致手性淬灭；电输运由离子迁移主导而非电子/空穴
AI.conclusion: 手性自旋交叉材料实现了手性光学活性的热开关控制，自旋态转变通过电子结构重组调控手性表达，且这类材料的电输运机制以离子迁移为主

title: Quantum Oscillations and Superconductivity in YPtBi Under Pressure
summary: The topological semimetal YPtBi has attracted considerable attention, owing to its novel superconducting and normal state properties. A strong band inversion from spin-orbit coupling allows the existence of $j=3/2$ quasiparticles near the Fermi level, which form Cooper pairs with angular momentum potentially higher than single or triplet states. In this report, we present high-pressure magnetotransport and Shubnikov-de Haas effect measurements on high-quality YPtBi up to $P = 2.08$ GPa. As a function of pressure, we observe a trend toward more insulating resistivity at low temperatures concomitant with a suppression of quantum oscillation amplitude. Together with a decrease of the upper critical field and significant increase in the Dingle temperature, the pressure-induced changes point to a weakening of the band inversion and potential tuning of the topological nature of YPtBi, suggesting pressure as a useful tool for understanding the nature of topology in other related half-Heusler compounds.

AI.tldr: 高压下YPtBi的磁输运和Shubnikov-de Haas效应测量显示，压力导致低温电阻率更绝缘、量子振荡幅度抑制、上临界场降低和Dingle温度显著增加，表明能带反转减弱和拓扑性质可能被调控。
AI.motivation: YPtBi作为拓扑半金属因其新颖的超导和正常态性质受到关注，其强自旋轨道耦合导致的能带反转使费米面附近存在j=3/2准粒子，可能形成角动量高于单重态或三重态的Cooper对。研究压力如何调控其拓扑性质对理解相关半Heusler化合物的拓扑本质具有重要意义。
AI.method: 对高质量YPtBi样品进行高达2.08 GPa的高压磁输运测量和Shubnikov-de Haas效应测量，分析压力对电阻率、量子振荡幅度、上临界场和Dingle温度的影响。
AI.result: 随着压力增加，观察到低温电阻率趋向更绝缘行为，量子振荡幅度被抑制，上临界场降低，Dingle温度显著增加。这些变化表明能带反转减弱，YPtBi的拓扑性质可能被压力调控。
AI.conclusion: 压力可以作为理解其他相关半Heusler化合物拓扑本质的有用工具，通过调控能带反转强度来改变材料的拓扑性质。

title: Controlled localization of anyons in a graphene quantum Hall interferometer
summary: Exchange statistics are a fundamental principle of quantum mechanics, dictating the symmetry of identical particle wavefunctions and thereby enabling emergent phenomena of many-body quantum states. The exchange-induced unitary transformation of both abelian and non-abelian anyonic wavefunctions can be probed using electronic fractional quantum Hall (FQH) interferometers, where quasiparticles propagating along the interfering FQH edge braid with those localized within the interferometer. Here, we add a gate-controlled dot/anti-dot in the center of a bilayer graphene FQH interferometer cavity to tune the number of enclosed anyons. We observe hundreds of controlled phase slips in the diagonal conductance across the interferometer for both abelian and non-abelian states, consistent with discrete changes in the localized quasiparticle population. For abelian anyons, the observed phase slips agree with the theoretically expected value. At half filling, our results suggest the interfering edge carries charge $|e^*/e| = 1/2$ abelian excitations, whereas charge $|e^*/e| = 1/4$ putative non-abelian anyons remain localized in the interferometer cavity. Controlling the population of localized $e/4$ anyons in an interferometer marks a significant milestone towards observing their non-local exchange statistics and building a fault tolerant topological qubit based on non-abelian anyon manipulation.

AI.tldr: 在双层石墨烯分数量子霍尔干涉仪中，通过栅极控制中心点/反点来调节局域任意子数量，观察到数百个可控相位滑移，证实了局域准粒子数量的离散变化，为实现非阿贝尔任意子交换统计和拓扑量子比特奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 交换统计是量子力学的基本原理，决定了全同粒子波函数的对称性，并导致多体量子态的涌现现象。通过电子分数量子霍尔干涉仪可以探测阿贝尔和非阿贝尔任意子波函数的交换诱导幺正变换，其中传播的准粒子与局域在干涉仪内的准粒子发生编织。本研究旨在通过控制局域任意子数量来观察其交换统计效应。
AI.method: 在双层石墨烯分数量子霍尔干涉仪腔体中心添加栅极控制的点/反点结构，用于调节被包围的任意子数量。通过测量干涉仪对角电导，观察阿贝尔和非阿贝尔态下的相位滑移现象，分析局域准粒子数量的离散变化。
AI.result: 观察到数百个可控相位滑移，与局域准粒子数量的离散变化一致。对于阿贝尔任意子，观测到的相位滑移与理论预期值相符。在半填充时，结果表明干涉边缘携带电荷|e*/e|=1/2的阿贝尔激发，而电荷|e*/e|=1/4的潜在非阿贝尔任意子仍局域在干涉仪腔体内。
AI.conclusion: 在干涉仪中控制局域e/4任意子数量是实现观测其非局域交换统计的重要里程碑，为基于非阿贝尔任意子操作的容错拓扑量子比特构建奠定了基础。

title: Time irreversibility and entropy production in non-Hermitian Model A field theories
summary: We develop a systematic framework to quantify irreversibility in scalar Model A field theories with a generic non-Hermitian term driving the dynamics. Using the stochastic path-integral formalism, we perform a controlled small-noise expansion, allowing the computation of the entropy production rate (EPR) and violations of the fluctuation-dissipation theorem (FDT). We show that the local EPR is entirely determined by the anti-Hermitian part of the linearised Langevin equation. Around steady states, the non-Hermitian component produces linear corrections to FDT violations and contributes quadratically to the EPR. As an illustration of the applicability of our approach, we analyse a minimal non-Hermitian extension of the Ginzburg-Landau $ψ^4$ theory describing a non-reciprocal Ising model at coarse-grained scales, for which we obtain explicit expressions of the local EPR, showing that it localises at interfaces in non-uniform states. Our results provide a general characterisation of TRS breaking in non-Hermitian scalar field theories.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一个系统框架来量化具有非厄米项的标量Model A场理论中的不可逆性，通过小噪声展开计算熵产生率和涨落耗散定理违反，并应用于非互易伊辛模型的Ginzburg-Landau理论。
AI.motivation: 研究非厄米标量场理论中的时间反演对称性破缺和不可逆性，为理解非平衡统计物理中的非厄米动力学提供系统框架。
AI.method: 使用随机路径积分形式，进行受控的小噪声展开，计算熵产生率和涨落耗散定理违反，分析线性化朗之万方程的非厄米部分。
AI.result: 局部熵产生率完全由线性化朗之万方程的反厄米部分决定；在稳态附近，非厄米分量对涨落耗散定理违反产生线性修正，对熵产生率产生二次贡献；在非互易伊辛模型中，熵产生率在非均匀态的界面处局域化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为量化非厄米标量场理论中的时间反演对称性破缺提供了通用方法，揭示了非厄米动力学与不可逆性之间的基本关系。

title: Thermodynamic Descriptors from Molecular Dynamics as Machine Learning Features for Extrapolable Property Prediction
summary: Machine learning (ML) models which rely on molecular structure excel at predicting properties for well-represented organic compounds, however their limited ability to extrapolate to chemotypes outside their training domain, remains a critical bottleneck in chemical discovery. This challenge is particularly acute in industrial discovery, where navigating uncharted chemical space to generate new intellectual property is a primary objective. Normal boiling points serve as a key benchmark for testing the extrapolative power of ML algorithms. A major limitation is that group-contribution methods are by design unable to generate predictions for molecules containing unparameterized fragments. Here, we demonstrate that this limitation can be overcome by replacing structural descriptors with thermodynamic properties computed directly from molecular dynamics simulations. We introduce a physics-augmented framework where a CatBoost regression model learns directly from ensemble-averaged cohesive energies, heats of vaporization, and densities extracted from atomistic liquid-phase simulations. Benchmark comparisons reveal that while both our physics-augmented model and conventional structure-based models perform comparably well on standard organic compounds, only the former maintains controlled error growth when extrapolating to structurally dissimilar chemical space. Our model successfully predicts boiling points for chemical classes entirely absent from training -- including inorganic compounds, salts, and molecules with elements like Si, B, and Te -- where structure-based models are fundamentally inapplicable. By encoding the intermolecular forces governing phase behavior, our framework establishes a generalizable strategy for property prediction beyond the structural boundaries of the existing methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种物理增强的机器学习框架，用分子动力学模拟计算的热力学性质替代结构描述符，显著提升了模型对训练域外化学结构的沸点预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于分子结构的机器学习模型在预测训练域外化学结构的性质时存在严重局限性，这成为化学发现中的关键瓶颈。特别是在工业发现中，探索未知化学空间以生成新知识产权是主要目标，而传统方法无法预测包含未参数化片段的分子的性质。
AI.method: 提出物理增强框架，使用CatBoost回归模型直接从原子级液相分子动力学模拟中提取的系综平均内聚能、汽化热和密度等热力学性质进行学习，替代传统的结构描述符。
AI.result: 在标准有机化合物上，物理增强模型与传统结构模型表现相当；但在外推到结构不同的化学空间时，只有物理增强模型能保持可控的错误增长。该模型成功预测了训练集中完全缺失的化学类别（包括无机化合物、盐类以及含Si、B、Te等元素的分子）的沸点，而这些是结构模型根本不适用的。
AI.conclusion: 通过编码控制相行为的分子间作用力，该框架建立了一种超越现有方法结构边界的通用性质预测策略，为解决机器学习在化学发现中的外推问题提供了新途径。

title: Bootstrap Embedding for Interacting Electrons in Phonon Coherent-state Mean Field
summary: We develop a fermi-bose bootstrap embedding (fb-BE) framework for the ground state of interacting elec- trons coupled to phonon mean field. The method combines bootstrap embedding for correlated electrons with a self-consistent coherent-state mean-field treatment for phonons. This method models the interacting electron-phonon problem as a system of correlated electrons traveling in a self-consistently specified potential landscape, allowing for efficient treatment of large lattice systems. Convergence of the methods for frag- ment size and total system size are demonstrated for one-dimensional Hubbard-Holstein model for up to 350 sites. Finite-size scaling is performed to extrapolate to infinite system size. Benchmarking against density matrix renormalization group for small 8-site system at half- and quarter-filling shows orders-of-magnitude runtime advantage. The comparison further reveals that the method performs best in regimes dominated by localization, such as the Mott insulating phase and the strong-coupling tiny polaron regime, where the local embedding ansatz is still valid. However, due to the mean-field treatment for phonons, we find limitations of our methods in the weakly coupled delocalized region and at the Peierls transition, where quantum phonon fluctuations and long-range kinetic correlations become substantial.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种费米-玻色子自洽嵌入方法，用于处理电子-声子耦合系统的基态，将电子关联与声子平均场相结合，在局域化主导的体系中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 开发一种能够高效处理大尺度电子-声子耦合系统的方法，特别是针对强关联电子与声子相互作用的问题，传统方法在处理大系统时计算成本过高。
AI.method: 结合自洽嵌入方法处理关联电子与相干态平均场处理声子，将电子-声子相互作用问题建模为在自洽势场中运动的关联电子系统。
AI.result: 方法在350个格点的一维Hubbard-Holstein模型中收敛性良好，与密度矩阵重整化群相比在8格点系统中具有数量级的计算速度优势，在Mott绝缘相和强耦合小极化子区域表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在局域化主导的强耦合区域非常有效，但由于声子的平均场处理，在弱耦合离域区域和Peierls相变点存在局限性，这些区域需要量子声子涨落和长程关联的精确处理。

title: Dimensionality tuning of heavy-fermion states in ultrathin CeSi2 films
summary: Dimensionality tuning is an important method to modify the electronic states of quantum materials. However, the mechanism of such tuning in heavy fermion systems and its connection with transport properties remain largely unexplored. Here by combining molecular beam epitaxy (MBE), in-situ angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) and transport measurements, we study the electronic states of the heavy-fermion compound CeSi2 as a function of film thickness. In three dimensional thick films, our measurements reveal a dispersive Kondo peak at the Fermi level (EF) and satellite peaks originating from crystal electric field (CEF) excitations, characteristic of heavy fermion systems. For two-dimensional ultrathin films, the CEF satellites are largely suppressed while the ground-state Kondo peak at EF remains strong, although it develops at lower temperatures. Simultaneously, the maximum temperature Tmax of the magnetic resistivity, \r{ho}m(T), changes from ~100 K in thick films to ~35 K in ultrathin films. This can be attributed to the dimensionality driven reduction of CEF excitations during the Kondo process, in good agreement with spectroscopic results. Our work provides direct insight to understand the quantum confinement effects on strongly correlated 4f-electron systems and opens up new opportunities to explore emergent phenomena in two-dimensional heavy-fermion materials.

AI.tldr: 通过厚度调控CeSi2薄膜的维度，研究重费米子系统中维度调控对电子态和输运性质的影响，发现从三维到二维转变时晶体电场激发被抑制而Kondo峰保持，同时磁电阻峰值温度降低。
AI.motivation: 研究重费米子系统中维度调控的机制及其与输运性质的关系，目前这方面研究较少。通过控制薄膜厚度来调节维度，探索量子限制效应对强关联4f电子系统的影响。
AI.method: 结合分子束外延(MBE)制备不同厚度的CeSi2薄膜，使用原位角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)表征电子态，同时进行输运测量。通过改变薄膜厚度实现从三维到二维的维度调控。
AI.result: 三维厚膜中观察到费米能级处的色散Kondo峰和晶体电场激发卫星峰；二维超薄膜中晶体电场激发卫星峰被显著抑制，而基态Kondo峰保持但形成温度降低。磁电阻峰值温度从厚膜的~100K降低到超薄膜的~35K。
AI.conclusion: 维度驱动的晶体电场激发减少是Kondo过程中维度调控的关键机制，与光谱结果一致。这项工作为理解强关联4f电子系统的量子限制效应提供了直接见解，并为探索二维重费米子材料中的新现象开辟了新机会。

title: Intrinsic Even-Odd Thickness-Driven Anomalous Hall in Epitaxial MnBi2Te4 Thin Films
summary: We demonstrate precise control of magnetism in MnBi2Te4 thin films through careful synthesis by molecular beam epitaxy, achieving minimal defects and accurate layer thickness control. By optimizing Mn-Bi-Te ratios and growth temperatures, we minimize detrimental self-doping effects and accurately target integer-layer films. X-ray diffraction and reflectivity provide quantitative measures of film quality and thickness. When these macroscale probes of structure and thickness are integrated with magnetotransport measurements, a striking even-odd layer dependence of the anomalous Hall effect is revealed. Odd-layer films exhibit a large hysteresis up to the Néel temperature (~25K), consistent with non-compensated antiferromagnetism, while even-layer films show minimal response, as expected for an antiferromagnet. The sign of the anomalous Hall effect exhibits a sign reversal for intrinsic magnetism versus magnetism associated with defects. This work identifies critical factors for inducing pure, non-compensated ferromagnetism and reveals the character of the intrinsic anomalous Hall effect in MnBi2Te4, which together is a step towards realizing the zero-field quantum anomalous Hall effect in topological materials.

AI.tldr: 通过分子束外延精确控制MnBi2Te4薄膜的磁性和层数，发现奇偶层数对反常霍尔效应的显著影响，为实现零场量子反常霍尔效应奠定基础。
AI.motivation: MnBi2Te4是一种拓扑材料，其磁性和拓扑性质的精确控制对于实现零场量子反常霍尔效应至关重要。然而，薄膜生长中的缺陷和层数控制问题阻碍了其本征磁性的研究。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延技术精确合成MnBi2Te4薄膜，优化Mn-Bi-Te比例和生长温度以最小化缺陷和自掺杂效应。使用X射线衍射和反射率定量表征薄膜质量和厚度，结合磁输运测量分析反常霍尔效应。
AI.result: 发现反常霍尔效应具有显著的奇偶层数依赖性：奇数层薄膜在尼尔温度(~25K)以下表现出大磁滞回线，符合非补偿反铁磁性；偶数层薄膜响应极小，符合反铁磁性。反常霍尔效应的符号可用于区分本征磁性和缺陷相关磁性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确定了诱导纯净非补偿铁磁性的关键因素，揭示了MnBi2Te4中本征反常霍尔效应的特性，为实现拓扑材料中的零场量子反常霍尔效应迈出了重要一步。

title: Double-twisted surface spectrum from hybridized Majorana Kramers pairs and wallpaper fermions
summary: We theoretically investigate the superconducting surface states of wallpaper fermions, which are surface quasiparticles of topological nonsymmorphic crystalline insulators protected by a wallpaper group $p4g$ symmetry, based on a tight-binding model for the space group $P4/mbm$ (No. 127). A symmetry-based analysis shows that four types of on-site pair potentials are allowed. Using the symmetries of the wallpaper group $p4g$ and the one-dimensional topological invariants, we clarify that for the $\mathrm{A_{1u}}$ representation, wallpaper fermions and two Majorana Kramers pairs coexist, and hybridization between them give rise to a double-twisted surface state and produces four peaks in the surface density of states. We further find that the mirror Chern number vanishes, indicating that our system realizes mirror-helicity-free surface states. This distinguishes superconducting wallpaper fermions from the other superconducting topological (crystalline) insulators, such as $\mathrm{Cu}_x\mathrm{Bi}_2\mathrm{Se}_3$ and $\mathrm{Sn}_{1-x}\mathrm{In}_x\mathrm{Te}$.

AI.tldr: 研究拓扑非对称晶体绝缘体中壁纸费米子的超导表面态，发现A1u表示下壁纸费米子与两个Majorana Kramers对共存，产生双扭曲表面态和四个态密度峰，系统实现无镜面螺旋度的表面态。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑非对称晶体绝缘体中壁纸费米子的超导表面态特性，区别于其他超导拓扑（晶体）绝缘体如Cu_xBi_2Se_3和Sn_{1-x}In_xTe，探索其独特的表面态行为。
AI.method: 基于空间群P4/mbm（No.127）的紧束缚模型进行理论分析，利用壁纸群p4g的对称性和一维拓扑不变量，研究四种允许的局域对势类型。
AI.result: 对于A1u表示，壁纸费米子与两个Majorana Kramers对共存，它们之间的杂化产生双扭曲表面态，在表面态密度中产生四个峰。镜面陈数为零，表明系统实现无镜面螺旋度的表面态。
AI.conclusion: 超导壁纸费米子表现出独特的表面态特性，区别于其他超导拓扑材料，其无镜面螺旋度的表面态为拓扑超导研究提供了新视角。

title: Hall conductance in a weakly time-reversal invariant open system
summary: The quantum Hall effect and the quantum anomalous Hall effect both require time-reversal invariance to be broken. We show that non-equilibrium effects can cause Hall physics to arise even when the system is weakly time-reversal symmetric and no magnetic field is applied. In our model, this occurs due to a fermionic subsystem breaking time-reversal invariance even if the system as a whole does not. The fermions receive a TRI-breaking self-energy, caused by interactions with bosonic degrees of freedom in the system and with an external reservoir. As a result, the fermions develop a non-quantized Hall conductance. We demonstrate that, unlike in the equilibrium case, the presence of a mass term is insufficient for the Hall conductance to appear, and wave-function renormalization effects have to be included.

AI.tldr: 非平衡效应可在弱时间反演对称系统中产生霍尔效应，无需磁场或强时间反演破缺
AI.motivation: 传统量子霍尔效应和量子反常霍尔效应都需要时间反演对称性破缺。本文探索在弱时间反演对称系统中，通过非平衡效应实现霍尔物理的可能性。
AI.method: 构建包含费米子和玻色子子系统的模型，费米子通过与系统内玻色子自由度和外部库的相互作用获得时间反演破缺的自能，从而产生非量子化的霍尔电导。
AI.result: 费米子子系统在非平衡条件下可自发破缺时间反演对称性，产生非量子化的霍尔电导。与平衡情况不同，质量项的存在不足以产生霍尔电导，必须考虑波函数重整化效应。
AI.conclusion: 非平衡效应可在弱时间反演对称系统中实现霍尔物理，为无需磁场或强对称性破缺的霍尔效应提供了新机制。

title: Third-order transitions in Ising and Potts models on Watts--Strogatz small-world networks
summary: We study third-order transitions in the two-dimensional Ising and Potts model on regular lattices and Watts--Strogatz small-world networks. Cluster observables are used to track post-critical boundary reorganization and pre-critical cluster breakup. For the Ising model, the critical temperature $T_c$ is calibrated independently from Binder-cumulant crossings and susceptibility peaks, whereas for the Potts model on small-world networks it is identified operationally from the dominant critical peak of $\mathrm d\langle P\rangle/\mathrm dT$. The independent and dependent third-order transitions are identified from the isolated-spin peak and the post-critical structural extremum, respectively. For both lattice and small-world topologies, we find the robust ordering $T_{\mathrm{ind}}<T_c<T_{\mathrm{dep}}$. Increasing the rewiring probability shifts all three characteristic temperatures upward and enhances the visibility of the post-critical transition. The effect is especially clear in the Potts model, where perimeter-based observables are more sensitive to multistate boundary fluctuations. The systematic persistence of the characteristic temperature hierarchy across topologies and finite sizes argues against interpreting these features as incidental finite-size irregularities. Instead, our results support their interpretation as genuine third-order transitions whose structural detectability can be amplified by network topology.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析二维Ising和Potts模型在规则晶格和小世界网络中的相变，发现了独立和依赖的三级相变，其温度顺序为T_ind < T_c < T_dep，且网络重连概率会增强这些相变的可观测性。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Ising和Potts模型在规则晶格和小世界网络中的三级相变，探究网络拓扑结构如何影响相变的可观测性和特征温度。
AI.method: 使用团簇观测量追踪临界后边界重组和临界前团簇分解。对于Ising模型，通过Binder累积量交叉和磁化率峰值独立校准临界温度Tc；对于小世界网络上的Potts模型，通过d⟨P⟩/dT的主导临界峰值操作性地识别Tc。从孤立自旋峰值识别独立三级相变，从临界后结构极值识别依赖三级相变。
AI.result: 在晶格和小世界拓扑中都发现了稳健的温度顺序T_ind < T_c < T_dep。增加重连概率会使所有三个特征温度上升，并增强临界后相变的可见性。Potts模型中基于周长的观测量对多态边界涨落更敏感。特征温度层次在不同拓扑和有限尺寸下的系统性持续表明这些特征不是偶然的有限尺寸不规则性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持将这些特征解释为真正的三级相变，其结构可检测性可以通过网络拓扑结构得到增强。网络拓扑能够放大这些相变的可观测性，特别是在Potts模型中表现得更为明显。

title: Note on a rigorous derivation of self-consistent double-hybrid functional theory via generalized Kohn-Sham theory and cumulant approximation
summary: In this short note, we present a rigorous theoretical derivation of the one-body double-hybrid density functional (OBDHF) theory, a novel self-consistent double-hybrid density functional framework that unifies the generalized Kohn-Sham (GKS) formalism with one-body Møller-Plesset second-order perturbation (OBMP2) theory. Conventional double-hybrid density functionals suffer from a fundamental theoretical inconsistency arising from the non-self-consistent treatment of the perturbative MP2 correlation, in which the orbitals entering the correlation energy expression are not variationally optimized with respect to the full double-hybrid energy functional. To address this deficiency, we construct a model energy functional as a linear combination of semilocal density functional approximation XC, a fraction $α_x$ of exact Hartree-Fock (HF) exchange, and a fraction $α_c$ of OBMP2 correlation. By virtue of the one-body operator structure of OBMP2, the perturbative correlation contribution is embedded directly and self-consistently into the GKS effective Hamiltonian, without recourse to the optimized effective potential (OEP) construction or perturbative orbital relaxation corrections. Through functional differentiation of the total OBDHF energy with respect to the orbitals, we derive the OBDHF effective Hamiltonian and the associated self-consistent field equations in a rigorous and transparent manner. This formulation provides a theoretically well-founded and practically tractable pathway to fully self-consistent double-hybrid density functional theory calculations within the GKS framework, resolving the self-consistency problem inherent in conventional double-hybrid functionals.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种理论一致的自洽双杂化密度泛函理论框架（OBDHF），通过将OBMP2相关能直接嵌入GKS有效哈密顿量，解决了传统双杂化泛函中MP2相关能非自洽处理的理论不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 传统双杂化密度泛函存在理论不一致性，因为MP2相关能计算中使用的轨道没有针对完整的双杂化能量泛函进行变分优化，导致非自洽处理。
AI.method: 构建了一个模型能量泛函，包含半局域密度泛函近似XC、分数α_x的精确HF交换和分数α_c的OBMP2相关能。利用OBMP2的单体算符结构，将微扰相关贡献直接自洽地嵌入GKS有效哈密顿量中，无需OEP构造或微扰轨道弛豫修正。
AI.result: 通过将总OBDHF能量对轨道进行泛函微分，以严谨透明的方式推导出OBDHF有效哈密顿量和相关的自洽场方程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为GKS框架内完全自洽的双杂化密度泛函理论计算提供了理论基础和实际可行的途径，解决了传统双杂化泛函固有的自洽性问题。

title: Proof-Carrying Materials: Falsifiable Safety Certificates for Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) are deployed for high-throughput materials screening without formal reliability guarantees. We show that a single MLIP used as a stability filter misses 93% of density functional theory (DFT)-stable materials (recall 0.07) on a 25,000-material benchmark. Proof-Carrying Materials (PCM) closes this gap through three stages: adversarial falsification across compositional space, bootstrap envelope refinement with 95% confidence intervals, and Lean 4 formal certification. Auditing CHGNet, TensorNet and MACE reveals architecture-specific blind spots with near-zero pairwise error correlations (r <= 0.13; n = 5,000), confirmed by independent Quantum ESPRESSO validation (20/20 converged; median DFT/CHGNet force ratio 12x). A risk model trained on PCM-discovered features predicts failures on unseen materials (AUC-ROC = 0.938 +/- 0.004) and transfers across architectures (cross-MLIP AUC-ROC ~ 0.70; feature importance r = 0.877). In a thermoelectric screening case study, PCM-audited protocols discover 62 additional stable materials missed by single-MLIP screening - a 25% improvement in discovery yield.

AI.tldr: 提出Proof-Carrying Materials (PCM)框架，通过对抗性证伪、置信区间精炼和形式化验证三阶段，显著提升机器学习原子间势在材料筛选中的可靠性，发现传统方法会漏掉93%的稳定材料。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习原子间势(MLIPs)在高通量材料筛选中缺乏形式化的可靠性保证，单个MLIP作为稳定性过滤器会漏掉大量密度泛函理论(DFT)稳定的材料，存在严重的可靠性问题。
AI.method: 提出Proof-Carrying Materials (PCM)框架，包含三个阶段：1) 在成分空间进行对抗性证伪；2) 使用95%置信区间进行自举包络精炼；3) 使用Lean 4进行形式化验证。该方法还训练风险模型来预测未见材料的失败。
AI.result: 在25,000材料基准测试中，单个MLIP作为稳定性过滤器的召回率仅为0.07（漏掉93%的DFT稳定材料）。PCM框架显著改善了这一问题，在热电材料筛选中发现了62个额外的稳定材料，将发现率提高了25%。风险模型在未见材料上的AUC-ROC达到0.938，跨架构转移性能良好。
AI.conclusion: PCM框架为MLIPs提供了形式化的可靠性保证，显著提升了材料筛选的准确性和发现率，揭示了不同MLIP架构存在特定的盲点，为可靠的材料发现提供了系统化解决方案。

title: Enhanced carrier binding and bond correlations in the Hubbard-Su-Schrieffer-Heeger model with dispersive optical phonons
summary: Electron-phonon (e-ph) interactions play a crucial role in determining many properties of materials. In this context, the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model, where atomic motion modulates the electronic hopping, has gained significant attention due to its potential for strong electron pairing in relation to high-Tc superconductivity. Previous studies of the SSH models have addressed many aspects of this problem, but have focused heavily on either dilute or half-filled models with dispersionless (Einstein) phonons. Here, we study the effects of dispersive optical phonons on the lightly doped one-dimensional optical Hubbard-SSH model using the density matrix renormalization group. We observe a significant enhancement in singlet binding driven by phonon dispersion; however, by calculating various correlation functions, we find that the enhanced binding does not translate to increased superconducting correlations but rather robust bond correlations in the studied parameter regime. Nevertheless, the significant impact of phonon dispersion on these correlations highlights the need to go beyond the Einstein phonon limit while modeling realistic quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 研究分散性光学声子对一维Hubbard-SSH模型中电子配对的影响，发现声子色散显著增强单重态结合，但未转化为超导关联，而是形成强键关联。
AI.motivation: SSH模型因与高温超导相关的强电子配对潜力而受关注，但以往研究多集中于稀薄或半填充的色散无关（爱因斯坦）声子模型，需要研究声子色散对实际量子材料的影响。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重整化群方法研究轻掺杂一维光学Hubbard-SSH模型中分散性光学声子的效应。
AI.result: 观察到声子色散显著增强单重态结合，但通过计算各种关联函数发现，增强的结合并未转化为超导关联，而是在研究参数范围内形成稳健的键关联。
AI.conclusion: 声子色散对这些关联的显著影响表明，在模拟实际量子材料时需要超越爱因斯坦声子极限。

title: Atomic-Scale Mechanisms of SiO$_2$ Plasma-Enhanced Chemical Vapor Deposition Revealed by Molecular Dynamics with a Machine-Learning Interatomic Potential
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, Supplementary material included as ancillary file (+10 pages)
summary: Plasma-enhanced chemical vapor deposition (PECVD) of silicon dioxide (SiO$_2$) is widely used for low-temperature fabrication of dielectric thin films, yet its atomic-scale growth mechanisms remain incompletely understood. In this work, we investigate SiO$_2$ PECVD using silane and N$_2$O as source gases via molecular dynamics simulations driven by a machine-learning interatomic potential. By systematically varying the oxidant-to-silane-derived species ratio $r$, we elucidate the evolution of film stoichiometry, density, and hydrogen content. Formation of the Si-O-Si network primarily proceeds via oxidation of surface Si-H groups to form Si-OH species, followed by condensation of neighboring Si-OH groups that produces H$_2$O as the dominant byproduct. At low $r$, H$_2$ formation via reactions between Si-H and Si-OH groups also contributes to the network formation. Increasing oxidant supply promotes the network formation through oxidation of residual Si-H species, suppressing hydrogen incorporation and leading to saturation of the Si/O ratio. Rapid chemisorption of silane-derived species, together with steric hindrance from pre-deposited species, results in localized growth and surface roughness. We further show that high-kinetic-energy plasma species can etch SiO$_2$ films, which potentially limits growth rates and enhances surface roughness under high RF-power conditions. These results provide atomic-scale insight into PECVD growth and guidance for optimizing film composition and quality.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习势函数的分子动力学模拟揭示了PECVD二氧化硅薄膜的原子尺度生长机制，包括氧化剂比例对薄膜成分、密度和氢含量的影响，以及表面粗糙度和等离子体蚀刻效应。
AI.motivation: 尽管等离子体增强化学气相沉积（PECVD）二氧化硅薄膜在低温制造中广泛应用，但其原子尺度的生长机制仍不完全清楚，需要深入研究以优化薄膜性能。
AI.method: 使用基于机器学习势函数的分子动力学模拟，以硅烷和N₂O为源气体，系统改变氧化剂与硅烷衍生物种的比例r，研究SiO₂ PECVD生长过程。
AI.result: Si-O-Si网络主要通过表面Si-H基团氧化形成Si-OH物种，随后相邻Si-OH基团缩合生成H₂O副产物；低r时Si-H与Si-OH反应生成H₂也促进网络形成；增加氧化剂促进残留Si-H氧化，抑制氢掺入，使Si/O比饱和；硅烷衍生物种的快速化学吸附和空间位阻导致局部生长和表面粗糙度；高动能等离子体物种可蚀刻SiO₂薄膜。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了PECVD生长的原子尺度见解，为优化薄膜成分和质量提供了指导，揭示了氧化剂比例、表面反应机制和等离子体蚀刻效应对薄膜性能的关键影响。

title: Theoretical proposal of superconductivity in hole-doped reduced bilayer nickelate La3Ni2O6: a manifestation of orbital-space bilayer model with incipient bands
summary: A correspondence exists between the multi-orbital Hubbard model and the bilayer Hubbard model, in which superconductivity is optimized in an incipient-band regime in both cases. In the multi-orbital system, the orbital level offset $ΔE$ plays a role analogous to the interlayer hopping in bilayer systems, and superconductivity is enhanced for large $ΔE$. We refer to such a multi-orbital model as an orbital-space bilayer model (OSBM). In this study, we theoretically propose that a reduced bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_6$ can be a candidate for a superconductor described by OSBM when an appropriate amount of holes is doped. By constructing a tight-binding model based on first-principles calculations, a large $ΔE$ between the Ni $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and the other $d$ orbitals is obtained due to the absence of outer apical oxygens. Furthermore, our fluctuation exchange approximation calculations indicate the emergence of $s\pm$-wave superconductivity driven by interorbital interactions in an incipient-band situation, where the superconducting gap function changes its sign between the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and other $d$ orbital bands. We also investigate the energetic and dynamical stability of the crystal structure under atomic substitution and pressure. Although La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ and La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_6$ share a similar chemical formula, our study shows that an entirely different pairing mechanism can take place in the latter.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出La₃Ni₂O₆可作为轨道空间双层模型(OSBM)的超导体候选材料，在适当空穴掺杂下可实现s±波超导，其配对机制与La₃Ni₂O₇完全不同。
AI.motivation: 探索新型镍酸盐超导材料，特别是研究La₃Ni₂O₆是否可作为轨道空间双层模型的实现平台，揭示不同于La₃Ni₂O₇的全新超导配对机制。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算构建紧束缚模型，分析轨道能级偏移ΔE；采用涨落交换近似计算研究超导配对；评估晶体结构在原子替代和压力下的能量与动力学稳定性。
AI.result: 发现La₃Ni₂O₆中Ni d_{x²-y²}轨道与其他d轨道间存在大的ΔE；在初生带情况下，轨道间相互作用驱动s±波超导，超导能隙在d_{x²-y²}和其他d轨道带间变号；结构稳定性分析支持实验可行性。
AI.conclusion: La₃Ni₂O₆是轨道空间双层模型超导体的有希望候选材料，其s±波超导机制与La₃Ni₂O₇完全不同，为探索新型镍酸盐超导提供了新方向。

title: Linear response of the Chern insulator MnBi$_2$Te$_4$: A Wannier function approach
summary: Recent work demonstrated that in the long wavelength limit the linear response of a Chern insulator to finite-frequency electric fields is the sum of two terms: A general frequency-dependent Kubo contribution that is present irrespective of band topology, and a topological Hall term that vanishes for topologically trivial insulators. Motivated by recent experiments and theoretical predictions, we use these expressions to calculate the optical conductivity and susceptibility of intrinsically magnetic MnBi$_2$Te$_4$ thin films with one, four, five, and eleven septuple layers by combining density functional theory with "single-shot" Wannier functions. To characterize the underlying topology of these systems, we compute the two-dimensional Chern number of these films using recently derived global expressions formulated in terms of Bloch energies and velocity matrix elements; the use of these expressions allows us to circumvent numerical issues at band crossings. Films with eleven septuple layers are of particular interest. We find that they have the same Chern number as five septuple layer films, in contrast to the reported "higher Chern-number phase" of these systems in other studies; we discuss a few possible reasons for the discrepancy. We also identify spin-orbit coupling-driven band inversions as a possible indicator of these topological phases.

AI.tldr: 该研究计算了不同层数MnBi2Te4薄膜的光学电导率和磁化率，结合密度泛函理论和Wannier函数方法，发现11层薄膜与5层薄膜具有相同的陈数，与之前报道的"更高陈数相"存在差异。
AI.motivation: 最近的研究表明，在长波长极限下，陈绝缘体对有限频率电场的线性响应由两部分组成：与能带拓扑无关的通用频率依赖Kubo项，以及仅存在于拓扑非平凡绝缘体中的拓扑霍尔项。受近期实验和理论预测的启发，研究者希望计算不同层数MnBi2Te4薄膜的光学响应特性。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论和"单次"Wannier函数方法，计算了1、4、5、11层MnBi2Te4薄膜的光学电导率和磁化率。使用基于布洛赫能量和速度矩阵元素的全局表达式计算二维陈数，避免了能带交叉处的数值问题。
AI.result: 发现11层薄膜与5层薄膜具有相同的陈数，这与之前报道的"更高陈数相"存在差异。研究者讨论了可能的差异原因，并指出自旋轨道耦合驱动的能带反转可能是这些拓扑相的一个指示器。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统研究不同层数MnBi2Te4薄膜的拓扑性质，澄清了11层薄膜的拓扑分类问题，为理解这些材料的拓扑相提供了新的见解，并强调了自旋轨道耦合在拓扑相形成中的重要作用。

title: Skyrmion-Bimeron Transformation in Bilayer Chiral Magnets with Competing Magnetic Anisotropy
summary:
In this work, we investigate the emergence of topological spin textures in a ferromagnetically coupled bilayer chiral magnet by means of Monte Carlo simulations of a classical spin model including exchange interaction, Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction, magnetic anisotropy, and an external magnetic field. To characterize the topology of the system, we construct a scalar chirality map in the $(K/J,h/J)$ parameter space.
  Our results reveal several magnetic configurations, including labyrinth structures, skyrmion lattices, ferromagnetic states, and meron-antimeron crystal phases. In particular, we show that the transition from easy-axis to easy-plane anisotropy drives a continuous transformation from skyrmion textures to bimeron-type configurations. The bilayer geometry introduces an additional stabilization mechanism, where interlayer exchange coupling correlates the topological cores in the two layers and increases the energetic cost of defect collapse.
  These findings provide a systematic topological texture map for bilayer chiral magnets and highlight coupled magnetic layers as a promising platform for stabilizing bimeron-type spin textures in nanoscale spintronic systems.

AI.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究双层手性磁体中拓扑自旋纹理的涌现，构建了(K/J, h/J)参数空间的标量手性图，揭示了多种磁构型及其转变规律。
AI.motivation: 研究双层手性磁体中拓扑自旋纹理的涌现机制，探索通过双层几何结构稳定bimeron型自旋纹理的可能性，为纳米尺度自旋电子学系统提供新的平台。
AI.method: 采用经典自旋模型的蒙特卡洛模拟，模型包含交换相互作用、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用、磁各向异性和外磁场。通过构建(K/J, h/J)参数空间的标量手性图来表征系统拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现了多种磁构型：迷宫结构、斯格明子晶格、铁磁态和meron-antimeron晶体相。特别展示了从易轴到易面各向异性的转变驱动了从斯格明子纹理到bimeron型构型的连续转变。双层几何通过层间交换耦合关联两层拓扑核，增加了缺陷坍塌的能量成本。
AI.conclusion: 为双层手性磁体提供了系统的拓扑纹理图，表明耦合磁层是稳定bimeron型自旋纹理的有前景平台，对纳米尺度自旋电子学系统具有重要意义。

title: Permutation invariant multi-scale full quantum neural network wavefunction
summary: Solving the intricate quantum behavior of interacting particles is key to unlocking the mysteries of condensed matter, but capturing their complex correlations across different scales remains a monumental challenge. We introduce a neural network framework that overcomes this barrier by modeling the full quantum wavefunction of a system, including electrons, nuclei and muons, directly capturing the full quantum effects beyond the Born-Oppenheimer approximation. The neural network approximates joint wavefunction of different interacting particles with a rigorous handling of permutation invariance, enabling simultaneous treatment of nuclear quantum effects and electron-nucleus-muon couplings without explicit excited states. Validated on molecular systems, this approach offers a computationally feasible way to model full quantum phenomena in complex many-body systems, establishing a direct connection between fundamental particle properties and emergent material behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经网络框架，直接建模包含电子、原子核和μ子的全量子波函数，超越玻恩-奥本海默近似，同时处理核量子效应和粒子间耦合。
AI.motivation: 解决相互作用粒子的复杂量子行为是理解凝聚态物质的关键，但捕捉不同尺度上的复杂相关性仍然是一个巨大挑战。传统方法难以处理超越玻恩-奥本海默近似的全量子效应。
AI.method: 引入神经网络框架，直接建模系统的全量子波函数（包括电子、原子核和μ子）。神经网络通过严格处理置换不变性来近似不同相互作用粒子的联合波函数，无需显式计算激发态，同时处理核量子效应和电子-原子核-μ子耦合。
AI.result: 在分子系统上验证了该方法的有效性，为复杂多体系统中的全量子现象建模提供了计算上可行的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了基本粒子性质与涌现材料行为之间的直接联系，为超越传统近似的量子系统建模开辟了新途径。

title: Electronic Coherence Evolution at the Nearly Commensurate Incommensurate CDW Boundary of 1T-TaS2
summary: Transition metal dichalcogenides host a variety of charge density wave phases that couple lattice, charge, and correlation effects. In 1T-TaS2, the commensurate and nearly commensurate states are well characterized, yet the transition near 350 K into the incommensurate phase has lacked direct momentum resolved insight. Here we use temperature dependent angle resolved photoemission spectroscopy to track the electronic structure across this transition. We observe a suppression of quasiparticle spectral weight at the Brillouin zone center, coincident with the transport anomaly, but without clear evidence of a full band gap opening. The transition appears to involve momentum dependent redistribution of spectral weight, consistent with a loss of coherence that reshapes the Fermi surface while leaving conduction dispersions largely intact. These results suggest that the nearly commensurate incommensurate transition may not align with a conventional metal insulator transition picture, but rather as an electronic reconstruction driven by loss of coherence. Our work provides new microscopic insight into the resistivity anomaly near room temperature and may guide design principles for collective electronic switching in Transition metal dichalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 通过角分辨光电子能谱研究1T-TaS2中近公度-非公度电荷密度波相变，发现该转变并非传统金属-绝缘体相变，而是由相干性损失驱动的电子重构过程。
AI.motivation: 1T-TaS2中的公度和近公度电荷密度波相已被充分表征，但350K附近的非公度相变缺乏直接的动量分辨电子结构信息，需要揭示其微观机制。
AI.method: 使用温度依赖的角分辨光电子能谱技术，追踪1T-TaS2在近公度-非公度相变过程中的电子结构演化。
AI.result: 观察到布里渊区中心的准粒子谱重被抑制，与输运异常同时发生，但未发现完全带隙打开的证据。相变涉及动量依赖的谱重重新分布，表现为相干性损失重塑费米面，而导带色散基本保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 近公度-非公度相变不符合传统金属-绝缘体相变图像，而是由相干性损失驱动的电子重构过程。这为室温附近的电阻异常提供了微观解释，并可能指导过渡金属二硫化物中集体电子开关的设计。

title: Valley-dependent electron-phonon scattering in thermoelectric semimetal Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$
summary: Quasi-one-dimensional transition-metal chalcogenide Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$ is a promising thermoelectric semimetal due to the strong electron-hole asymmetry in the carrier lifetime. However, the microscopic origin of such a strong asymmetry remains unclear. In this study, we theoretically investigate electron-phonon scattering in Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$. There is a soft phonon mode mainly consisting of atomic displacements in PdSe$_4$ chains. This soft mode is strongly coupled with the highest valence band at the $Γ$ point, which lies slightly below the Fermi energy, and causes strong electron-phonon scattering. The bottom of the electron pocket energetically overlapped with that band also suffers from strong intervalley scattering, by which the imaginary part of the electron self-energy exhibits a sharp change near the Fermi level. On the other hand, the imaginary part of the self-energy for carriers in the hole pocket shows a moderate energy dependence. Thus, we find that electron-phonon scattering is strongly valley-dependent. Our finding will help us to understand the distinctive transport properties observed in Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过理论计算揭示了Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$中电子-声子散射的强烈谷依赖性，解释了其热电性能中电子-空穴不对称性的微观起源。
AI.motivation: Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$作为准一维过渡金属硫族化合物，在热电应用中表现出强烈的电子-空穴不对称性，但这种不对称性的微观起源尚不清楚。
AI.method: 通过理论计算研究Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$中的电子-声子散射，特别关注PdSe$_4$链中的软声子模式及其与能带的耦合。
AI.result: 发现软声子模式与Γ点最高价带强烈耦合，导致强电子-声子散射；电子口袋底部也受到强谷间散射，而空穴口袋的散射则相对温和。
AI.conclusion: 电子-声子散射具有强烈的谷依赖性，这一发现有助于理解Ta$_2$PdSe$_6$中观察到的独特输运性质。

title: Multiple Magnetic Transitions in the Trilayer Nickelate Pr$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ Revealed by Muon-Spin Rotation
summary: A muon-spin rotation/relaxation ($μ$SR) study of the trilayer Ruddlesden--Popper nickelate Pr$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ was performed at ambient pressure and under hydrostatic pressure up to 2.2 GPa. Three magnetic transitions were identified at ambient pressure: the onset of spin-density-wave (SDW) order at $T_{\rm SDW} \simeq 158$ K, an intermediate-temperature transition at $T^{\ast} \simeq 90$--100 K, and a low-temperature transition at $T_{\rm SDW}^{\rm Pr} \simeq 25$--27 K. While the intermediate transition at $T^{\ast}$ induces only minor changes in the internal-field distribution, the transition at $T_{\rm SDW}^{\rm Pr}$ is accompanied by a pronounced reconstruction of the magnetic structure, consistent with previous reports attributing enhanced interlayer coherence to the ordering of the Pr sublattice. The high-temperature transition at $T_{\rm SDW}$ is characterized by the sharp development of static internal magnetic fields with a narrow transition width of $0.65(4)$ K. Weak-transverse-field measurements reveal a finite thermal hysteresis of $0.27(6)$ K, with $T_{\rm SDW}^{\rm warming} > T_{\rm SDW}^{\rm cooling}$, indicating weakly first-order-like behavior. Hydrostatic pressure suppresses $T_{\rm SDW}$ linearly and reduces the ordered Ni magnetic moment $M$, with corresponding rates of ${\rm d}T_{\rm SDW}/{\rm d}p = -4.9(1)$ K/GPa and ${\rm d}\ln M/{\rm d}p = -2.0(5)\times10^{-2}$ GPa$^{-1}$, respectively, thereby demonstrating a gradual weakening of the spin-density-wave instability under compression.

AI.tldr: 通过μSR技术研究Pr4Ni3O10镍酸盐在常压和高压下的磁相变，发现三个磁转变温度，其中SDW转变具有弱一级相变特征，高压会线性抑制SDW转变温度并减小磁矩。
AI.motivation: 研究Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐Pr4Ni3O10的磁相变行为，特别是在高压下SDW（自旋密度波）有序的变化，以理解该材料中磁有序的稳定性及其对外部压力的响应。
AI.method: 使用μSR（μ子自旋旋转/弛豫）技术在常压和最高2.2 GPa的静水压下研究Pr4Ni3O10。通过测量不同温度下的μ子自旋弛豫行为，识别磁相变并分析内部磁场分布的变化。
AI.result: 在常压下识别出三个磁转变：SDW有序起始于TSDW≈158 K，中间转变T*≈90-100 K，低温转变TSDW^Pr≈25-27 K。TSDW转变具有窄转变宽度0.65(4) K和热滞后0.27(6) K，表现为弱一级相变。高压线性抑制TSDW（dTSDW/dp=-4.9(1) K/GPa）并减小磁矩（dlnM/dp=-2.0(5)×10^-2 GPa^-1）。
AI.conclusion: Pr4Ni3O10表现出复杂的磁相图，SDW有序在高压下逐渐减弱，表明压缩会削弱自旋密度波不稳定性。低温转变与Pr亚晶格有序相关，增强了层间相干性。

title: Optically Driven Orbital Hall Transport in Floquet Odd-Parity Collinear Altermagnets with High Chern Numbers
summary: Recent studies have attracted increasing interest in nonrelativistic odd-parity magnetism and its associated topology in collinear altermagnets. Here, based on symmetry analysis and an effective model, we demonstrate that Floquet engineering can induce $f$-wave odd-parity altermagnetism in two-dimensional collinear antiferromagnetic multilayers via the coupling between circularly polarized light (CPL) and layer degrees of freedom. Furthermore, modifying the CPL induces nonequilibrium quantum anomalous Hall effect (QAHE) with tunable Chern numbers up to $C=\pm8$, arising from layer- and valley-dependent band inversions. The induced topological phase transitions provide an efficient means to manipulate the orbital Hall effect (OHE) by redistributing orbital angular momentum. First-principles calculations reveal that experimentally accessible VSi$_2$N$_4$ serves as a viable platform for topological phase diagram of the QAHE and OHE, featuring pronounced trigonal warping. Our findings establish a versatile route toward optically controllable topological phenomena, opening new opportunities for future developments in topological spintronics and orbitronics.

AI.tldr: Floquet工程可在二维反铁磁多层中诱导f波奇宇称altermagnetism，并通过调控圆偏振光实现可调Chern数达±8的量子反常霍尔效应，同时调控轨道霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 探索非相对论性奇宇称磁性及其拓扑性质在altermagnets中的调控方法，开发光学可控的拓扑现象新途径。
AI.method: 基于对称性分析和有效模型，利用圆偏振光与层自由度的耦合实现Floquet工程，通过第一性原理计算验证VSi₂N₄作为实验平台。
